title: Bolsius 103614060102 Pillar Candle, Paraffin Wax, White
description: Product Description Bolsius Aromatic pillar candles are coated with a fragrance and colour. This means that the fragrance released is a subtle one. Pillar candle flames are bright and their wicks are easy to relight. Pillar candles are sold individually. This makes it easy if you want to change fragrances, or want to combine one single scented candle with a group of non-scented candles. Box Contains 1 x Pillar Candle, White
